debug_info.goal:
ι : Type u_1
R : Type u_2
E : Type u_3
inst✝⁴ : Field R
inst✝³ : LinearOrder R
inst✝² : IsStrictOrderedRing R
inst✝¹ : AddCommGroup E
inst✝ : Module R E
s : Finset ι
f : ι → E
t : Finset { x // x ∈ ↑s }
w : { x // x ∈ ↑s } → R
hw₀ : ∀ i ∈ t, 0 ≤ w i
hw₁ : t.sum w = 1
⊢ ∑ x ∈ {x ∈ s | ∃ (x_1 : x ∈ s), ⟨x, ⋯⟩ ∈ t}.attach, w ⟨↑x, ⋯⟩ = 1 ∧
    s.centerMass (fun i => if h : ∃ (x : i ∈ s), ⟨i, ⋯⟩ ∈ t then w ⟨i, ⋯⟩ else 0) f =
      (affineCombination R t (f ∘ Subtype.val)) w

failed_attempts:
rw [← Finset.coe_map (Function.Embedding.subtype _), ← Finset.mem_coe,

      · simp [Finset.sum_dite, h, Finset.sum_attach, Finset.sum_image Subtype.val_injective, hw₁]

refine ⟨?_, ?_⟩

        rw [this, Finset.sum_map]
        congr with x
        simp

      have h_eq : ∑ i ∈ s, (if hi : i ∈ Subtype.val '' ↑t then w ⟨i, by aesop⟩ else 0) = ∑ x ∈ t, w x := by

      · rw [affineCombination_eq_centerMass _ _ _ hw₁, Finset.centerMass_eq_of_sum_1 _ _ hw₁,

rw [Finset.centerMass, Finset.filter_mem_eq_inter,

Finset.sum_image Subtype.val_injective, affineCombination_eq_centerMass hw₁,

refine ⟨?_, ?_⟩
      · rw [← hw₁]
      · rw [affineCombination, centerMass, hw₁, inv_one, one_smul]

        refine Finset.sum_bij (fun y _ ↦ y.val) ?_ ?_ ?_ ?_
        · intro y hy
          simp only [Finset.mem_filter, Set.mem_image, Finset.mem_coe, Finset.mem_val, true_and]
          exact ⟨y.2, y, hy, rfl⟩
        · intro y _; dsimp; congr
        · intro a b _ _ h; exact Subtype.coe_injective h
        · intro b hb

          rcases hb with ⟨_, y, hy, rfl⟩

let e : { x // x ∈ s } ↪ ι := ⟨Subtype.val, Subtype.coe_injective⟩
      have : (s.filter fun i ↦ ∃ x, ⟨i, x⟩ ∈ t) = t.map e := by ext; simp [e]; aesop
      rw [this, Finset.sum_map, Finset.centerMass, Finset.sum_map]
      simp_rw [show ∀ x ∈ t, (if h : x.1 ∈ Subtype.val '' ↑t then w ⟨x.1, by aesop⟩ else 0) = w x by

      simp [hw₁, affineCombination_eq_linear_combination _ _ _ hw₁]

rw [affineCombination_eq_centerMass _ _ _ hw₁, centerMass, centerMass]
      convert And.intro hw₁ rfl <;>
        exact (Finset.sum_bij (fun x _ ↦ x) (by aesop) (fun _ _ _ _ ↦ Subtype.val_injective)
          (by aesop) (by aesop)).symm
